texto: I think Liberals may tend to be more people oriented, whereas Conservatives are more task oriented. It makes Liberals look softheaded to Conservatives and Conservatives hardhearted to Liberals. I'm a Libertarian for the most part. I guess we're just assholes. Practical, critical thinking assholes who ask evil selfish questions like Why are we being punished for something someone else did or might possibly do?, Who is supposed to pay for this? and What about my children and their future?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rock Cowles: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I think Liberals may tend to be more people oriented, whereas Conservatives are more task oriente…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, libertarian, rock-cowles pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e rock-cowles.

texto: If you have lived your life in such a way that no one has ever found you obnoxious then you have my condolences for you have never really lived.
explicacao: Citação de Rock Cowles sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “If you have lived your life in such a way that no one has ever found you obnoxious then you have …” articula vida, black-sheep, freedom em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como freedom e liberty.
